title: Mobile views of app installed not working

posts.author: Cesar1 (Anasco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m facing this error inside monday.com mobile app. This message is showed:

image1170×2532 143 KB

The app’s view work fine on the web, but not on mobile. I tried Uninstall and Install it again but still got the same error.
